_comment: Anthropic-prompt context for Output 2. Defines the funding-type-aware table layouts and the universal scenario fields.

scenarios.fallback_few_comparables: If <3 comparables: conservative = realistic × 0.5, optimistic = realistic × 2.0; confidence drops one band.

Publisher.description: Publisher recoups budget first, then takes 30% post-recoup.
Publisher.studio_share_formula: if (gross - steam_share) <= recoupment: 0 else 0.70 × (gross - steam_share - recoupment)

Crowdfunding.description: Top section: KS feasibility (goal, fees, fulfilment, net raised, backers needed). Bottom section: post-launch revenue using the Self-Funded math.

Grant.description: Top section: grant assumed = full budget; remaining gap = max(0, budget - grant). Bottom section: post-launch revenue using the Self-Funded math.

scoring: if Current Wishlists is set and > 0: +1
for each social channel with count > 0: +1 (cap +3)

price_handling.missing: use median price of comparables; price_assumed=true; price_source='comparables_median'; rationale must say 'Price: $X.XX (median of N comparable [genre]s at your studio scale).'
